visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a close-up of a young woman with long dark hair, wearing a blue denim jacket over a black top and a white pearl necklace. She is smiling and holding a black wireless microphone. Behind her is a massive, yellow, inflatable cartoon potato with big eyes and buck teeth. The lighting is bright and natural outdoors. (2) The scene shifts to a wide shot of an outdoor event space at an old brick factory site. A yellow booth with "Lay's" branding is prominent, with the text "樂事24小時鮮採直送站" visible. A crowd of people is gathered around. The girl takes a selfie with three giant inflatable potatoes. (3) She shows a red number "001" card to the camera and then poses in front of the yellow booth. Inside the booth, workers wearing yellow hats, aprons, and black gloves are seen deep-frying fresh potato slices in a professional kitchen setup. (4) The scene transitions to the girl sitting indoors at a wooden table. She is eating fresh chips. Behind her is a large mural depicting a sunny potato field. She picks up a chip and bites it, looking directly at the lens. (5) She showcases three small plates of creative potato snacks. The first features a chip topped with a black truffle garnish on a creamy base; the second has mashed potatoes with crispy bacon bits; the third is a small plastic cup filled with cream, an orange slice, and crushed chips. (6) In the final segment, the girl is back outside under a yellow umbrella. She holds a green bag of seaweed-flavored Lay's chips, posing happily. There are several bags of chips piled on a table nearby.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 只要跟馬鈴薯合照. [Variety]: 可以免費吃現炸洋芋片? + 3種特殊小吃? (2) [Subtitle]: 今天來到「樂事24小時鮮採直送站」. [Logo]: Lay's 樂事. (3) [Subtitle]: 在這邊跟巨型馬鈴薯合照 在FB指定貼文上傳照片的話 可以免費吃現炸洋芋片喔！在現場直接油炸！超新鮮！這些都是免費>< 超讚好好吃. (4) [Subtitle]: 旁邊還有內用位子喔！會先提供現炸洋芋片. [Variety]: *請開啟音量*. (5) [Slogan]: 超脆. [Subtitle]: 完美保留馬鈴薯本身的風味！非常推薦吃看看！3種洋芋片小吃也上了！ (6) [Subtitle]: 英式松露嫩蛋脆薯 松露跟蛋香超搭 完全像是一道料理！讓我想在我也試做看看. (7) [Subtitle]: 黃金比例脆薯泥 這個超好吃！薯泥跟炸培根的組合也太好吃了啦. (8) [Subtitle]: 柑橘優格薯片千層 洋芋片竟然也能變成甜點？！不只保留了洋芋片的脆感 還搭配了柑橘和優格 酸酸甜甜超好吃. (9) [Subtitle]: FB照片上傳好了的話 也可以領樂事洋芋片！全程活動都可以免費參與 大家趕快來華山劇場吧！！！

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 female main creator, approximately 7 people in the background at the venue booth.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young woman with long, dark wavy hair, wearing a pearl necklace, a black inner top, and a light-wash blue denim jacket.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Outdoor urban square with historical brick buildings, a yellow branded pop-up booth, inflatable potato sculptures, and an indoor dining area with a farm-themed mural background.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The video starts with a bright, energetic female voiceover delivering a hook. An upbeat, major-key electronic pop track with a synthesized beat at approximately 128 BPM plays in the background. (2) A synthesized "whoosh" sound effect triggers as the speaker continues her rapid-fire narration about the event location. (3) A distinct "pop" sound effect coincides with a visual text update. The female speaker's tone remains high-pitched and high-arousal. (4) A loud, crisp, and high-frequency "crunch" sound (ASMR style) occurs as she bites into a chip. The music dips slightly in volume to emphasize the crunch. (5) A series of five rapid-fire crunch sounds occur in rhythm with the editing. (6) A high-pitched "ding" or "bell" sound effect introduces the special snack menu. (7) Another sharp "crunch" sound is heard during the tasting phase. (8) The voiceover concludes with an enthusiastic invitation, while the background music swells slightly for a final cadence before a hard cut at the end.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Hook -> Venue Tour -> Product Demonstration -> CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To promote a limited-time Lay's pop-up event in Taipei where visitors can get free chips and unique snacks by engaging with social media activities.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct mention of the brand name, physical presence at a branded pop-up station, and display of product packaging.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video utilizes social-media native editing with high-density ASMR crunch sounds and fast-paced text overlays to maintain engagement.
